title: Simply Hypercharged
description: A Mod Pack Helps you Optimize Your Game.
body:
![Simply HyperCharged](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd2b490727794aa12f34473dfd98ead0589635b7.png)

# **Introducing Simply Hypercharged**
Get ready to experience Minecraft like never before with Simply Hypercharged! This carefully curated mod pack is designed to enhance your gameplay without overwhelming you with unnecessary complexity. With a focus on optimization and performance, Simply Hypercharged offers a balanced and immersive experience that will keep you coming back for more.

# **Why Simply Hypercharged ?**
Experience Minecraft without compromise on older or less powerful systems. Simply Hypercharged is a carefully curated mod pack designed to deliver smooth, enjoyable gameplay while minimizing system resource demands.

# **Features**
- Enhanced Performance: Enjoy smoother gameplay and reduced lag with optimized textures, resource packs, and performance tweaks.

- Balanced Gameplay: Experience a well-rounded gaming experience with a mix of exploration, crafting, and combat.

- Quality-of-Life Improvements: Benefit from various enhancements that make your Minecraft journey more enjoyable, such as improved user interface and streamlined crafting recipes.

- Community-Driven: Join a vibrant community of players who share your passion for optimized Minecraft experiences.

- Optimized Shaders: Experience stunning visuals without sacrificing gameplay performance. Our carefully curated shader pack includes options for low-end PCs, ensuring you can enjoy the beauty of Minecraft without overwhelming your system.

- Connected Textures: Immerse yourself in a more cohesive and realistic world with seamless texture transitions.

- Adjustable Zoom: Customize your view with adjustable zoom levels, allowing you to focus on specific details or take in the broader landscape.

- Rapid World Loading: Enjoy shorter loading times and dive into your Minecraft adventures faster than ever before.

- Instantaneous Saving: Quickly save your progress without interrupting your gameplay, ensuring your hard work is always protected.
  
# **Mods**
I have not made any of the mods in this modpack, they have all been downloaded from the Modrinth App. I do not take any responsibility if you get banned when using this modpack in a server that shouldn't support it, some mods provide an unfair advantage and will get you banned.

# **Compatibility**
For optimal performance, Simply Hypercharged includes the optional "nvduim" mod, which leverages NVIDIA's mesh shader technology for a significant boost in framerate. This mod is compatible with NVIDIA GPUs from the Turing architecture and newer, including the 16xx and 20xx series. If your graphics card doesn't meet these requirements, simply delete the "nvduim" mod, and the pack will continue to provide a smooth and enjoyable Minecraft experience.
